\caption{Effect of the synthetic-augmentation pipeline against the
no-augmentation baseline (NO\_SYNTH), aggregated across augmented modes
per backbone. ``Sig.'' counts pairs with BH-FDR $q<0.05$ on the paired

accuracy in our 4-class setup, whereas every augmented mode reaches at
least $80\%$. Wilcoxon results at the $n{=}5$ two-sided floor
($\approx$0.0625) are reported in the supplementary CSV.}
